prompt: Order these environmental events from earliest to latest

events.title: Yellowstone National Park
events.fact: 1872 — Ulysses S. Grant establishes first national park

events.title: Silent Spring published
events.fact: 1962 — Rachel Carson raises awareness of pesticide dangers

events.title: Ozone hole discovered
events.fact: 1985 — British Antarctic Survey alerts world of depletion

events.title: Montreal Protocol signed
events.fact: 1987 — global agreement to phase out CFCs

events.title: Kyoto Protocol adopted
events.fact: 1997 — treaty to reduce greenhouse gas emissions

events.title: Paris Agreement signed
events.fact: 2015 — treaty to limit global warming below 2 °C
